hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.rs) cargo fmt --manifest-path /home/blackat/project/Hoshi2Star/src-tauri/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /home/blackat/project/Hoshi2Star && pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(npm install|yarn add|git push --force)'; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "INTERDIT: utiliser pnpm. Commande bloquée."}'; exit 2; fi
